name: Louisiana Pralines
recipeIngredient: Walden Farm Vanilla Glazed Nuts, 2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread pecan halves on a baking sheet. Preheat oven to 350°F and toast for 5 minutes. Cool and set aside.
2. In a small heavy saucepan, melt 1 cup sugar over low heat.
3. Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, combine the remaining sugar with evaporated milk and cook until almost boiling.
4. Add the melted sugar to the mixture in the large saucepan, stirring constantly. Cook until it reaches 238°F on a candy thermometer or forms a firm but soft ball when dropped into cold water.
5. Remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients (salt, butter, vanilla extract). Stir until the mixture begins to thicken.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto aluminum foil and let set.
7. Peel off the foil and store pralines in a covered container.
